source: The commissioners divided the parish into three sorts of men: those who owned the land they worked; those who rented it from a neighbour; those who worked it for a wage and owned nothing but the tools. The categories were tidier on paper than in any village street, where a man might rent four acres, own one, and hire himself out at harvest to the farmer whose hedge he had helped to plant. Tidiness was the point. A survey that admitted how mixed the arrangements really were would have been useless to the men who commissioned it, who wanted a number they could tax.

expect.why: A list semicolon reads as a full stop aloud.
The last item of a spoken list needs its connector.

prepared: The commissioners divided the parish into three sorts of men: those who owned the land they worked, those who rented it from a neighbour, and those who worked it for a wage and owned nothing but the tools. The categories were tidier on paper than in any village street, where a man might rent four acres, own one, and hire himself out at harvest to the farmer whose hedge he had helped to plant. Tidiness was the point. A survey that admitted how mixed the arrangements really were would have been useless to the men who commissioned it, who wanted a number they could tax.
notes: A semicolon enumeration that a listener hears as three unfinished sentences; the final item needs an “and” that the page never printed. The anchors must carry a neighbouring word because a bare semicolon occurs twice.
